text:
Perfect! I've updated the portfolio loading logic to:

1. **Skip tokens with zero balance** - Added a check `if (balance === 0) continue` before processing each token
2. **Only show chains with tokens** - Since we skip zero-balance tokens, chains will only be added to the `chainData` map if they have at least one token with a non-zero balance

This means:
- Chains with no tokens won't appear in the portfolio
- Only tokens with actual balances will be displayed
- The portfolio will be cleaner and more relevant to the user's actual holdings
